items.criterion: The PR implements KUSABI-CORE-MVP-MEMORY-BINDING-REMEDIATION-001 and does not substitute runtime remediation, local config mutation, release, or publish work.
All changed files remain within the Cell allowed paths, with no src, package, workflow, deploy, local config, DB content, docs/v2, schema, fixture, runner, branch protection, or ruleset edits.

The runbook defines explicit decision states for shared PostgreSQL, URL-only fail-closed pending, explicit SQLite exceptions, missing project, ignored URL, entrypoint drift, inactive, and blocked bindings.
The runbook clearly separates repository documentation from local operator config edits, host restarts, and smoke writes.
The runbook preserves SQLite default and explicit SQLite local-only exceptions while stating PostgreSQL URL intent is fail-closed after PR #186.
The runbook defines safe host restart timing and a bounded smoke evidence format for active bindings.

The PR does not edit local MCP/Claude/Codex configs, env files, secrets, stored memory content, DB schemas, env vars, DB paths, package metadata, workflows, deployment, branch protection, or rulesets.
Diff checks and changed YAML/JSON parse evidence are present and match the reported scope.
The PR does not authorize backend parity, common DB completion, UAMP conformance, compliance, federation, release, publish, DLP, zero-leakage, or legal/regulatory claims.
